title: solenotus adsurgens
intro: Solenotus adsurgens, also known as Solenostemon adsurgens, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Lamiaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating various skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Solenotus adsurgens include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
